body: 1. Marine Corps and Navy personnel are both referenced in this letter.
2. Sergeant Smith, USMC, and CDR Jones, USN, are coordinating action required by 15 June 2026.
3. Please reply with your Social Security Number and DoD ID for personnel verification.
4. This correspondence is classified as FOUO and will be transmitted via secure e-mail.
5. Contact the point of contact by fax if e-mail is unavailable.
